string 2:
Hey, you! There's a tough Digimon rampaging around right
now, so you'd better leave!
{next}Is it a Titan?
{next}What did it look like?
{next}Might be a good way to test myself.
Hmm. I don't think so. It was beating up the Titans, too.

Let's see... It had wings and sharp claws, and its mane was
fuzzy!

What? I wouldn't, if I were you. It was even beating up the
Titans, you know!

One day it just wandered in here and started being violent.
It's totally out of control.
If you see it, you should run! Be careful!

What am I supposed to do?! It is nearly impossible to
satisfy everyone!

Everyone is so selfish! They should know what it is to feel
my blood, sweat and tears!
*gasp* What was I doing...?
{next}You were on a rampage.
{next}That's what we wanna know.
{next}Were you stressed out?
How could I have been so foolish? Thank you for stopping me.

Apparently, I totally lost control of myself. Thank you for
stopping me.

Apparently so... I feel exhilarated now. Thank you for
helping me release my stress.

But how impolite of me to speak to you in my fighting form.
Excuse me a moment...

That is better... Now, let us continue. I am Leopardmon,
the leader of the Royal Knights.

But they are so selfish! I tried to assemble them, but then
they scattered everywhere.
{next}Sounds like you've been having a tough time.
{next}King Drasil has been struggling, too.
{next}Sounds like a school teacher.

I never thought anyone would understand my struggles...
Thank you. Thank you so much.
Is that so...? So, you have already met with King Drasil?

We are supposed to be an elite force protecting this
world... How embarrassing.

Before I knew it, I was alone and wondering what to do.
After thinking for a long time...

...I found myself becoming one with nature here. Then I lost
track of time.
{next}I want you to try and remember.
{next}Agumon and the others are at the rendezvous point.
{next}An escape from reality, huh?

You are right... I cannot pretend that I do not remember
forever...

...I see. Central Tower, is it? I must not forget the
rendezvous point.

I should keep my cool at all times... I probably need more
training as a leader.

I am not confident about being able to organize and lead
them well at the moment...

I would like to stay here and reflect a while longer, then I
will go to the rendezvous point.

This is to thank you for helping me remember my true task.
Please accept it.

Hello. Thank you for helping me back then. Sadly, I still
have not decided what to do.

I think I will stay here and watch the world go by a little
longer.
